2603.24539.title: CliPPER: Contextual Video-Language Pretraining on Long-form Intraoperative Surgical Procedures for Event Recognition
2603.24539.paper_summary: Video-language foundation models have proven to be highly effective in zero-shot applications across a wide range of tasks. A particularly challenging area is the intraoperative surgical procedure domain, where labeled data is scarce, and precise temporal understanding is often required for complex downstream tasks. To address this challenge, we introduce CliPPER (Contextual Video-Language Pretraining on Long-form Intraoperative Surgical Procedures for Event Recognition), a novel video-language pretraining framework trained on surgical lecture videos. Our method is designed for fine-grained temporal video-text recognition and introduces several novel pretraining strategies to improve multimodal alignment in long-form surgical videos. Specifically, we propose Contextual Video-Text Contrastive Learning (VTC_CTX) and Clip Order Prediction (COP) pretraining objectives, both of which leverage temporal and contextual dependencies to enhance local video understanding. In addition, we incorporate a Cycle-Consistency Alignment over video-text matches within the same surgical video to enforce bidirectional consistency and improve overall representation coherence. Moreover, we introduce a more refined alignment loss, Frame-Text Matching (FTM), to improve the alignment between video frames and text. As a result, our model establishes a new state-of-the-art across multiple public surgical benchmarks, including zero-shot recognition of phases, steps, instruments, and triplets. The source code and pretraining captions can be found at https://github.com/CAMMA-public/CliPPER.
2603.24539.paper_summary_zh: 視頻語言基礎模型在各種任務的零樣本應用中已被證明非常有效。特別具有挑戰性的領域是術中手術程序領域，這裡標註數據稀缺，且通常需要精確的時間理解以應對複雜的下游任務。為了解決這一挑戰，我們推出了CliPPER（針對事件識別的長格式術中手術程序的上下文視頻語言預訓練），這是一個新穎的視頻語言預訓練框架，訓練於手術講座視頻上。我們的方法旨在進行精細的時間視頻文本識別，並引入幾種新穎的預訓練策略，以改善長格式手術視頻中的多模態對齊。具體而言，我們提出了上下文視頻文本對比學習（VTC_CTX）和片段順序預測（COP）預訓練目標，這兩者都利用時間和上下文依賴性來增強局部視頻理解。此外，我們在同一手術視頻內部引入了視頻文本匹配的循環一致性對齊，以強化雙向一致性並改善整體表示的連貫性。此外，我們引入了一種更精細的對齊損失，幀文本匹配（FTM），以改善視頻幀與文本之間的對齊。因此，我們的模型在多個公共手術基準上建立了新的最先進技術，包括階段、步驟、工具和三元組的零樣本識別。源代碼和預訓練標題可以在 https://github.com/CAMMA-public/CliPPER 找到。
2603.24539.author: Florian Stilz et.al.
2603.24539.authors: Florian Stilz, Vinkle Srivastav, Nassir Navab, Nicolas Padoy
